title: Shimano Stella SW: The Absolute Apex of Saltwater Reels
excerpt: We put the world's most expensive spinning reel through 12 months of brutal saltwater testing. Is it still the king?

content.intro: The Shimano Stella SW is more than just a fishing reel; it's a statement. Since its inception, the Stella series has been the benchmark against which all other saltwater spinning reels are measured.
content.performance: In our tests, the Infinity Drive system provided a level of cranking power we've never felt in a spinning reel. Fighting 100lb bluefin tuna felt controlled, even at maximum drag settings.
content.verdict: If you can afford the entry price, there is simply no better tool for the job. It is a masterpiece of Japanese engineering.
